name: Tuesday VOC mining
prompt: Read last 7 days of customer reviews + refunds + CS messages. Use /skill voc-ad-copy to mine 3 ad-copy hooks. Save to outputs/hooks/{week}.md.

name: Wednesday asset batch
prompt: Produce 5 creative assets via /skill higgsfield-generate. Pick 3 hooks from Tuesday + 2 evergreen brand assets. Save to outputs/library/{date}/. Tag each by audience + funnel stage.

name: Thursday scroll-stop variants
prompt: Pick top 2 hooks from this week. Use /skill scroll-stop-prompter to generate scroll-stopping video prompts. Save prompts + reference frames to outputs/scroll-stops/{week}/.

name: Friday creative briefing
prompt: Compile this week's 5 assets + 2 scroll-stops into a briefing doc. Tag for Notion Content Calendar (Social Media) and Paid Ads creative queue.
